Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import traceback
from supabase import create_client
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
try:
    c = create_client\(os.environ['SUPABASE_URL'], os.environ['SUPABASE_ANON_KEY']\)
    print\('create_client: OK'\)
    c.postgrest.auth\('faketoken'\)
    print\('postgrest.auth: OK'\)
except Exception as e:
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
import httpx
load_dotenv\(\)

url = os.environ['SUPABASE_URL'].rstrip\('/'\) + '/rest/v1/backtest_runs?limit=1'
headers = {
    'apikey': os.environ['SUPABASE_ANON_KEY'],
    'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + os.environ['SUPABASE_ANON_KEY'],
}
r = httpx.get\(url, headers=headers, timeout=10\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
print\('Body[:120]:', r.text[:120]\)
")
Bash(Last analysis: Xm ago" bar on the dashboard:*)
